description: HttpRunner 是一款开源的 API/UI 测试框架，简单易用，功能强大，具有丰富的插件化机制和高度的可扩展能力。

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-4374-p667-p6c8 in golang.org/x/net@0.14.0
findings.recommendation: Upgrade golang.org/x/net to a version that resolves GHSA-4374-p667-p6c8. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-4374-p667-p6c8 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
